evals.prompt: Our bank has $100M in CET1 capital and $800M in Risk-Weighted Assets. Are we Basel III compliant?
evals.expected_output: Should calculate the CET1 ratio ($100M / $800M = 12.5%). Should compare this to the Basel III minimum (4.5% + buffers). Should conclude the bank is currently compliant. Should provide a Regulatory Compliance Dashboard.
assertions: Compares ratio to Basel III 4.5% minimum
Identifies CET1 as common equity and retained earnings
Output follows Regulatory Compliance Dashboard structure
